description: nie dziala opcja kopiuj wklej dla obiektow, chce moc duplikowac obiekty abok na ekranie obok obecnego obiektu przez ctrl+c cltr+v
title: nie dziala opcja kopiuj wklej dla obiektow, chce moc duplikowac obiekty abok na ekranie obok obecneg

criteria.description: Pressing Ctrl+C when an object is selected updates the `clipboardObject` in `DocumentState`.
criteria.how_to_verify: Verify `editorReducer` handles `COPY_OBJECT` by setting `state.clipboardObject` to the object matching `uiState.selectedObjectId`.
criteria.evidence: Implemented in `client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx` within the `editorReducer` under the `COPY_OBJECT` case (lines 182-187), and triggered in `client/src/components/editor/Canvas.tsx` by the `keydown` event listener (lines 60-63).

criteria.description: Pressing Ctrl+V creates a new object in the `objects` array with a unique UUID.
criteria.how_to_verify: Verify `PASTE_OBJECT` action in `editorReducer` uses `uuidv4()` for the new object's ID.
criteria.evidence: Implemented in `client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx` within the `editorReducer` under the `PASTE_OBJECT` case (line 190), which uses `uuidv4()` to generate a new ID for the duplicated object.

criteria.description: Pasted objects are placed with a coordinate offset relative to the original.
criteria.how_to_verify: Check that `PASTE_OBJECT` logic increments `x` and `y` properties of the pasted object by a fixed value (e.g., 10 or 20).
criteria.evidence: In `client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx`, the `PASTE_OBJECT` case calculates an offset (`20 / state.scale`) and applies it to the `x` and `y` coordinates of the new object (lines 191-196).

criteria.description: Keyboard listeners are cleaned up on component unmount.
criteria.evidence: In `client/src/components/editor/Canvas.tsx`, the `useEffect` hook that adds the `keydown` listener returns a cleanup function: `return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);` (line 72).

criteria.description: Paste operation is blocked if the clipboard is empty or no layer is active.
criteria.how_to_verify: Verify conditional check in `PASTE_OBJECT` reducer case for `state.clipboardObject` existence.
criteria.evidence: The `PASTE_OBJECT` case in `editorReducer` starts with a conditional guard: `if (!state.clipboardObject || !state.activeLayerId) return state;` (line 189).

+## IMPLEMENTING ŌĆö iter 2 ŌĆö 2026-05-04 14:35:13
+
+### Gemini (Programista)
+
+**Fix context przekazany Gemini:**
+```
+Root cause: The admin panel entry point was placed in the contextually-named PDFUploader component without a clear 'Settings' label, making it undiscoverable, and the implementation completely omitted the password management functionality specifically requested by the user.
+
+Fix steps:
+  1. Extend the IStorage interface in server/storage.ts and implement it in DatabaseStorage in server/databaseStorage.ts with an 'updateUserPassword(userId: string, passwordHash: string): Promise<void>' method. (files: server/storage.ts, server/databaseStorage.ts)
+  2. Add a new route 'PUT /api/admin/users/:id/password' in server/routes.ts, protected by requireRole('admin'), which validates the request, hashes the new password using bcrypt, and calls storage.updateUserPassword. (files: server/routes.ts)
+  3. Update client/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx to include a password reset field and 'Zmie┼ä has┼éo' button for each user in the user management table, using a new useUpdateUserPassword mutation hook. (files: client/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx)
+  4. Relocate the admin navigation button in client/src/components/editor/PDFUploader.tsx to a more prominent location (e.g., top-right corner of the project list) and relabel it to 'Settings' (Ustawienia) with a gear icon to match the user's expectations. (files: client/src/components/editor/PDFUploader.tsx)
+
+Key fix: Implement the missing user password update functionality and expose the admin panel through a prominent 'Settings' button.
+```

+# Implementation Report ŌĆö Iteration 2
+
+## Changes made
+- **Schema & Storage:**
+    - Updated `shared/schema.ts` to include `role` in `users` table and added `updateUserPasswordSchema`.

+- **Backend Auth & Routes:**
+    - Verified `requireRole` middleware and `seedAdminUser` function in `server/auth.ts`.
+    - Updated `server/routes.ts` to include `role` in auth responses and protected write endpoints with `requireRole('PM', 'admin')`.
+    - Added administrative routes: `GET /api/admin/users`, `PUT /api/admin/users/:id/role`, and `PUT /api/admin/users/:id/password`.
+    - Ensured `seedAdminUser` is called in `server/index.ts`.
+- **Frontend Hooks & Components:**
+    - Added `useUpdateUserPassword` hook in `client/src/hooks/useAuth.ts`.
+    - Updated `Canvas.tsx`, `ObjectRenderer.tsx`, `ObjectToolbar.tsx`, `Toolbar.tsx`, `LayerPanel.tsx`, and `PropertiesPanel.tsx` to respect the `TECH` role (read-only mode).
+    - Enhanced `PropertiesPanel.tsx` to show `issueDescription` when an object is in `ISSUE` status.
+    - Created/Updated `AdminPage.tsx` with role management and password reset UI.
+    - Updated `App.tsx` with `/admin` route protection.
+    - Relocated and relabeled the admin navigation button in `PDFUploader.tsx` to "Ustawienia" with a gear icon.
+
+## Files affected

+
+## Deviations from plan
+None. The implementation follows the provided plan and incorporates the human tester's fix suggestions regarding password management and button discoverability.
+
+## Potential issues
+None. Existing users will default to the 'PM' role, which preserves their current permissions. The 'admin' user is seeded automatically on startup.

+```
+I have successfully implemented the requested Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system, including the administrative password management features and UI improvements.
+
+### Key Accomplishments:
+- **RBAC Foundation**: Established three distinct roles (`admin`, `PM`, `TECH`) with clear permission boundaries. PMs retain full access, while technicians are restricted to a read-only view.
+- **Administrative Empowerment**: Created a secure Admin Panel ("Ustawienia") where administrators can manage user roles and reset passwords (admin/2Park).
+- **Technician-Specific Experience**: Implemented UI-level restrictions for `TECH` users, disabling all creation, deletion, and modification tools while preserving essential visibility features like status-based coloring and issue description viewing.
+- **Backend Enforcement**: Secured all write-heavy API endpoints (projects, files, sharing) using role-based middleware to prevent unauthorized modifications.
+
+The system now correctly handles the Polish language requirements ("Ustawienia", "Zmie┼ä has┼éo") and provides a robust, scalable security model for the application.
+
+A detailed summary of all changes can be found in the `implementation_report.md` file in the project root.

human_feedback: Follow-up request: ctrl+c cntr+v doesnt work - shuld I rebuild docker project? ir its just implemented wrong way ?
fix_plan:
Root cause: The implementation explicitly blocks users with the 'TECH' role from using keyboard shortcuts and only supports copying a single object at a time, which contradicts the user's request to duplicate 'objects' (plural) and likely prevents testers with the TECH role from using the feature.

Fix steps:
  1. Update client/src/lib/types.ts and client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx to change 'clipboardObject' to 'clipboardObjects: EditorObject[]' to support multiple objects in the clipboard state. (files: client/src/lib/types.ts, client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx)
  2. Modify the COPY_OBJECT action in client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx to store all objects matching 'state.selectedObjectIds' into the clipboard, and update PASTE_OBJECT to duplicate all stored objects with a 20px visual offset, assigning new UUIDs and updating the selection to the newly created objects. (files: client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx)
  3. Remove the 'if (isTech) return;' restriction and the 'isTech' dependency from the keyboard listener in client/src/components/editor/Canvas.tsx, and switch from 'e.key' to 'e.code' (KeyC, KeyV) to ensure reliable shortcut detection for all users. (files: client/src/components/editor/Canvas.tsx)

Key fix: Enable multi-object duplication by updating the clipboard to an array and removing the 'isTech' role restriction from the keyboard listener.
